untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit trendline/slope regression calculation which is not available in the allowed indicator set. The source references 'Chapter 7' for trendline/slope regression methodology. No direct trendline or slope indicator is available. Used SMA crossing as a proxy for trendline direction change, but this is an approximation and may not match the intended regression-based logic.
translation_notes: Original signal specifies 'trendline or slope turns up/down' based on regression analysis. Allowed indicators do not include a dedicated trendline or slope indicator. Substituted with SMA_50 crossovers as a reasonable approximation for trend direction changes. Parameters specify calculation_interval of 10-250 days; SMA_50 is within this range. Transaction costs noted as $125 per trade but not encoded in this rule structure. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT (bidirectional).
